gh_d84189d3af685f86cfe258c9.title: WAOHire - Golang Developer - Remote in HCMC - FT
gh_d84189d3af685f86cfe258c9.description:
**Requirements:**
- Minimum 6 years experiences of Golang development
- Strong knowledge of SQL DB (MySQL) operation and schema design
- Experienced in websocket, microservice and Rest API,...
- Experienced in mointoring system, optimize system
- Knowledge of basic T-SQL scripting and concept ORM
- Good self-motivate and learning independent
- Can follow coding principle and well coding style
- Dedicated working
- Better to have experience of secondary development
- Knowledge of DB performance analysis
- Able to read and write technical documents in English

**Benefits:**
- Competitive salary (upto $2500)
- Remote working (only for Vietnamese candidates located in HCMC)
- Working in a professional, friendly, well-equipped environment both with foreigners and Vietnamese.
- Extensive on job training, you will always have a chance to work with new emerging technologies.
- Social insurance, health insurance & unemployment insurance according to Vietnam Labor Law.
- 12-day annual leave per year.

Contact:
- Zalo: 0834033300
